title: Opioid Antidote Distribution * Ex-Offenders - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Opioid Antidote Distribution * Ex-Offenders 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CLACKAMAS COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE CLACKAMAS COUNTY TRANSITION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers access to care and case management services providing assistance with such services as SNAP enrollment, 12 step meetings, mental health and substance use assessments, cognitive therapy, finding employment and/or housing, parenting class referrals, GED courses, and hygiene items. Also offers on-site distribution and training in usage of Naloxone. 2219 Kaen Road Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Adults with involvement in the criminal justice system Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 722-6199 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE CLACKAMAS COUNTY TRANSITION CENTER
